requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 / 干扰产生设备——ISED ICES
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 / 干擾產生設備——ISED ICES

summary.en: Lighting equipment that is an interference-causing equipment product for Canada must comply with Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada (ISED) requirements under the Radiocommunication Act framework and the applicable Interference-Causing Equipment Standard, commonly ICES-005 for lighting equipment. The obligation is the Canadian radiocommunication/interference-causing equipment regime; ICES-005 is the ISED technical standard route for emissions compliance and required Canadian compliance labelling.
summary.zh: 作为加拿大干扰产生设备的照明设备，须符合加拿大创新、科学及经济发展部（ISED）在《无线电通信法》框架下的要求及适用干扰产生设备标准，照明设备通常适用 ICES-005。强制义务来自加拿大无线电通信/干扰产生设备制度；ICES-005 是 ISED 针对发射合规及加拿大合规标识的技术标准路径。
summary.zht: 作為加拿大干擾產生設備的照明設備，須符合加拿大創新、科學及經濟發展部（ISED）在《無線電通信法》框架下的要求及適用干擾產生設備標準，照明設備通常適用 ICES-005。強制義務來自加拿大無線電通信/干擾產生設備制度；ICES-005 是 ISED 針對發射合規及加拿大合規標識的技術標準路徑。

standards_or_laws: ISED Interference-Causing Equipment Standard ICES-005 — Lighting Equipment

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 17743 (CISPR 15-based limits for lighting equipment radio disturbance characteristics) and related EMC standards, with CCC or CQC coverage depending on product category. Chinese EMC reports may help engineering review but do not replace the Canadian ISED ICES compliance file and label statement.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用 GB/T 17743（基于 CISPR 15 的照明设备无线电骚扰特性限值）及相关 EMC 标准，并按产品类别适用 CCC 或 CQC。中国 EMC 报告可支持工程评审，但不能替代加拿大 ISED ICES 合规文件和标签声明。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用 GB/T 17743（基於 CISPR 15 的照明設備無線電騷擾特性限值）及相關 EMC 標準，並按產品類別適用 CCC 或 CQC。中國 EMC 報告可支持工程評審，但不能替代加拿大 ISED ICES 合規文件和標籤聲明。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment
GB/T 18595 — Immunity requirements for general lighting equipment

gap.en: Canada focuses on ISED interference-causing equipment compliance and Canadian labelling statements, not CE EMC or China CCC EMC evidence. Verify whether the luminaire, LED driver, dimmer, wireless control module, or smart lighting function triggers additional radio equipment certification beyond ICES emissions. Test reports should reference the applicable ICES issue and Canadian voltage/frequency configuration.
gap.zh: 加拿大关注 ISED 干扰产生设备合规及加拿大标签声明，而不是 CE EMC 或中国 CCC EMC 证据。需核查灯具、LED 驱动器、调光器、无线控制模块或智能照明功能是否在 ICES 发射之外触发额外无线电设备认证。检测报告应引用适用 ICES 版本及加拿大电压/频率配置。
gap.zht: 加拿大關注 ISED 干擾產生設備合規及加拿大標籤聲明，而不是 CE EMC 或中國 CCC EMC 證據。需核查燈具、LED 驅動器、調光器、無線控制模組或智能照明功能是否在 ICES 發射之外觸發額外無線電設備認證。檢測報告應引用適用 ICES 版本及加拿大電壓/頻率配置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ISED interference-causing equipment compliance applies where the lighting product is within ICES scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or voluntary depending on product category — Chinese EMC evidence follows GB/T standards and CCC/CQC scope

source.publisher: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada (ISED)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Canadian EMC compliance for LED lighting is handled through the ISED interference-causing equipment regime and the applicable ICES standard, typically ICES-005 for lighting equipment. China GB/T EMC reports do not automatically satisfy Canadian ICES labelling or documentation obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】加拿大 LED 照明 EMC 合规通过 ISED 干扰产生设备制度及适用 ICES 标准处理，照明设备通常为 ICES-005。中国 GB/T EMC 报告不会自动满足加拿大 ICES 标签或文件义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】加拿大 LED 照明 EMC 合規通過 ISED 干擾產生設備制度及適用 ICES 標準處理，照明設備通常為 ICES-005。中國 GB/T EMC 報告不會自動滿足加拿大 ICES 標籤或文件義務。
